items.headline: Stocks Slide Amid Inflation Fears and Geopolitical Tensions; Tech Sector Under Pressure
items.summary: U.S. stock markets experienced a broad sell-off today, with major indices declining as investors reacted to hotter-than-expected May inflation data and escalating geopolitical tensions between the United States and Iran. The tech and semiconductor sectors, particularly AI-related names, continued to face heavy selling pressure, while some defensive sectors saw rotation.

items.headline: Super Micro Computer Plunges on Equity Raise
items.summary: Shares of Super Micro Computer ($SMCI) plummeted over 17% after the company announced a $7 billion equity raise, intensifying a broader retreat across Wall Street.

items.headline: Aditxt Dives Amid Reverse Stock Splits
items.summary: Aditxt ($ADTX) saw its stock plummet over 30% today, reportedly amid ongoing reverse stock splits and increasing investor skepticism.

items.headline: Nvidia Extends Pullback as Chip Stocks Remain Under Pressure
items.summary: Nvidia ($NVDA) extended its pullback, falling nearly 2.7%, as AI and chip names remained under heavy pressure in today's trading session.

items.headline: Autozi Internet Technology Surges on Capital Injection
items.summary: Autozi Internet Technology ($AZI) surged over 63% following a capital injection from its controlling shareholders, despite noted concerns about its sustainability.

items.headline: Velo3D Rises on Strategic Deals and Strong Revenue
items.summary: Velo3D ($VELO) rose nearly 20% following news of new strategic deals and robust Q1 2026 revenue growth, driven by demand from defense and aerospace.

items.headline: Robinhood Markets Jumps on Strategic Update
items.summary: Robinhood Markets ($HOOD) saw a jump of approximately 6% following a strategic update.

items.headline: May CPI Hits Three-Year High, Fueling Inflation Concerns
items.summary: The Consumer Price Index (CPI) for May 2026 increased to an annual rate of 4.2%, marking a three-year high. Monthly, the CPI rose 0.5%, with core inflation also showing an increase of 2.9% year-on-year. This data, released today, intensifies concerns about persistent inflation.

items.headline: Federal Reserve Holds Steady, Future Rate Hike Looms
items.summary: There are no Federal Open Market Committee (FOMC) announcements scheduled for today, June 10. The next highly anticipated meeting is set for June 16-17, 2026, where the Federal Reserve is expected to keep rates unchanged for now, but high inflation data has led to expectations of a potential rate increase before the end of the year.

items.headline: Chewy Reports Strong Q1 2026 Financial Results
items.summary: Chewy, Inc. ($CHWY) released its financial results for the first quarter of fiscal year 2026 today, announcing net sales of $3.36 billion, an increase of 7.7% year-over-year, and diluted earnings per share of $0.23. The company highlighted resilience and strong execution despite a dynamic consumer backdrop.

items.headline: Oracle Among Companies Expected to Report Earnings Today
items.summary: Oracle ($ORCL) is among several major companies expected to report earnings today, June 10, 2026. These announcements are crucial for influencing market perceptions and stock valuations, especially in the technology sector.

items.headline: US-Iran Military Strikes Escalate Geopolitical Tensions, Push Oil Higher
items.summary: Geopolitical tensions escalated significantly today as the United States and Iran reportedly traded military strikes. This development rattled global markets and contributed to a rise in crude oil prices, adding another layer of worry for the global economy.

items.headline: AI and Chip Stocks Continue to Face Selling Pressure
items.summary: The artificial intelligence (AI) and semiconductor sectors remained under heavy pressure today, with major tech and chip shares experiencing sharp declines. Investors are showing nervousness regarding the high costs associated with AI investments and are seeking clearer proof of profitability.
